title: galium hirtellum
intro: Galium hirtellum, also known as hairy bedstraw, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the bedstraw family (Galium). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and fever, as well as acting as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Galium hirtellum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat urinary tract issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems.
